name: Strawberry Tall Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package yellow cake mix, pudding version
recipeInstructions:
CAKE:
Bake the cake as directed in two 8-inch pans. Cool completely.
Slice each layer in half, resulting in four layers.
GLAZE:
Cut strawberries into small pieces and mix with glaze.
ICING:
Beat together cream cheese, sugar, whipped topping, and confectioner's sugar until smooth.
ASSEMBLY:
Spread the icing mixture on one cake layer. Cover with half of the glaze mixture.
Repeat with the other three layers. Cover the top and sides of the cake with the remaining icing.
Top with a couple of strawberries.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
